curation.note: This universe publishes actual Pokemon single idProduct values from products_singles_6 for the Cardmarket expansion. Count is the Cardmarket product-row count, not a printed checklist or reverse-holo checklist count. No reverse-holo or *-holo price fields are represented as separate products.
